name: IdsEdwSubPcaFExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT sub_pca.SUB_PCA_SK, COALESCE(cd_src.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, sub_pca.SUB_UNIQ_KEY, sub_pca.SUB_PCA_ACCUM_PFX_ID, sub_pca.PLN_YR_BEG_DT_SK AS SUB_PCA_PLN_YR_BEG_DT_SK, sub_pca.EFF_DT_SK AS SUB_PCA_EFF_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cls.CLS_SK, cls.CLS_ID, grp.GRP_SK, grp.GRP_ID, CASE WHEN LEN(dbo.trim_default(CASE WHEN grp.GRP_NM IS NOT NULL THEN grp.GRP_NM ELSE ' ' END))=0 THEN 'NA' ELSE grp.GRP_NM END AS GRP_NM, subgrp.SUBGRP_SK, subgrp.SUBGRP_ID, sub_pca.SUB_SK, COALESCE(cd_carovrcalc.TRGT_CD, 'UNK') AS SUB_PCA_CAROVR_CALC_RULE_CD, COALESCE(cd_carovrcalc.TRGT_CD_NM, 'UNKNOWN') AS SUB_PCA_CAROVR_CALC_RULE_NM, sub_pca.ALLOC_AMT AS SUB_PCA_ALLOC_AMT, sub_pca.BAL_AMT AS SUB_PCA_BAL_AMT, sub_pca.CAROVR_AMT AS SUB_PCA_CAROVR_AMT, sub_pca.MAX_CAROVR_AMT AS SUB_PCA_MAX_CAROVR_AMT, sub_pca.PD_AMT AS SUB_PCA_PD_AMT, sub_pca.TERM_DT_SK AS SUB_PCA_TERM_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, sub_pca.SUB_PCA_CAROVR_CALC_RULE_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.SUB_PCA sub_pca JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR mbr ON sub_pca.SUB_SK=mbr.SUB_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.GRP grp ON sub_pca.GRP_SK=grp.GRP_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLS cls ON mbr.CLS_SK=cls.CLS_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.SUBGRP subgrp ON mbr.SUBGRP_SK=subgrp.SUBGRP_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG cd_mppng ON mbr.MBR_RELSHP_CD_SK=cd_mppng.CD_MPPNG_SK AND cd_mppng.TRGT_CD='SUB' LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG cd_src ON sub_pca.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=cd_src.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG cd_carovrcalc ON sub_pca.SUB_PCA_CAROVR_CALC_RULE_CD_SK=cd_carovrcalc.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE sub_pca.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}

Annotations:
This is Source extract data from an IDS table and apply Code denormalization, create a load ready file.

Job Name:
IdsEdwSubPcaFExtr

Table:
SUB_PCA_F
Read from source table SUB_PCA from IDS. Apply Run Cycle filters to get just the needed rows forward
This is a load ready file conforms to the target table structure.

Write SUB_PCA_F Data into a Sequential file for Load Job.
Code SK lookups for Denormalization

Lookup Keys: 
CD_MPPNG_SK
Add Defaults and Null Handling
